name: heroicons-animated-document-chart-bar-icon
title: Animated Document Chart Bar Icon
author: Heroicons Animated
description: Renders the Heroicons Document Chart Bar glyph with source-authored on-demand motion and imperative controls.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file.
Added isAnimated and prefers-reduced-motion guards to the existing imperative and hover controls.
Retimed source-authored high-frequency icon motion to at most 280ms per element, with numeric base delays capped at 80ms and stagger steps capped at 40ms.

modifications.change: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file. Added isAnimated and prefers-reduced-motion guards to the existing imperative and hover controls. Retimed source-authored high-frequency icon motion to at most 280ms per element, with numeric base delays capped at 80ms and stagger steps capped at 40ms.
modifications.reason: Resolved the bundled utility import, added explicit animation disablement and reduced-motion handling, and bounded high-frequency timing.
